overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \% \text {Convert G(s) = (2s^{\wedge} 2 + 8s + 6) / (s^{\wedge} 3 + 8s^{\wedge} 2 + 16s + 6)} \\ \% \text {to a state - space representation} \\ \% \\ \text {num = [2 8 6]; den = [1 8 16 6]; sys\_tf = tf(num,den);} \\ \text {sys\_ss = ss(sys\_tf);} \end{array}\tag{a}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \% \text {Convert } G(s) = (2s^{2} + 8s + 6) / (s^{3} + 8s^{2} + 16s + 6) \\ \% \text {to a state - space representation} \\ \% \\ \text {num = [2 8 6]; den = [1 8 16 6]; sys\_tf = tf(num,den);} \\ \text {sys\_ss = ss(sys\_tf);} \end{array}\tag{a}
